name: Marketing Automation Playbook
description: Marketing Automation Playbook - Marketing template for growth professionals
instructions: HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE Step 1: Run the Automation Audit Honestly assess your current automation capabilities across 8 dimensions. The scoring reveals where to focus first. Step 2: Browse the Workflow Library Review 30+ pre-built workflow blueprints. Pick the ones most relevant to your current funnel gaps. Step 3: Build Email Sequences Use the Email Sequence Builder to plan each automated sequence step by step: triggers, delays, content, and exit conditions. Step 4: Set Up Lead Scoring Define your scoring model in the Lead Scoring Setup. Assign points for behavioural actions and demographic f
